meaning: adj.无思想的,不留心的,未加思虑的
examples: He doesn't say those silly things that unthinking people say.
However, we do have to challenge the unthinking complaint that the sector does not do enough in taking ideas to market.
And underneath it all was a breezy, unthinking optimism, that prices could only ever go up.
Website creators need to be aware of the need to protect the privacy of unthinking users.
Somewhere between the always-broke, always-stoned Lebowski, and the always angry, unthinking Walter Sobchak there may lie a balance.
